pkgmetadata.longdescription: Meta package that sets up a complete Chinese input environment on Gentoo Linux with KDE Plasma. Pulls in Fcitx5, Chinese fonts, and a Win11-inspired theme. Configures per-user Fcitx5 settings for a Microsoft Pinyin-like experience including Ctrl+Space switching, Shift toggle, inline preedit, 5-candidate pages, and cloud pinyin.
